summary: #88743 is open and inactive enough for review, but it does not satisfy the boringly-clear low-signal close bar. It is a focused 20-line docs-only SMS/Twilio A2P guidance change, has supplied proof, green relevant checks, and a ClawSweeper review saying it is ready for maintainer/docs review. The job explicitly requires human handling for green checks and technical correctness/product judgment, so no close action is planned.

actions.reason: Automatic low-signal closure is blocked because the PR has green checks, supplied proof, and a focused docs change whose usefulness requires maintainer/docs judgment.

needs_human: Decide whether the focused SMS/Twilio A2P docs guidance in https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88743 should be accepted, revised, or closed as product/docs policy.
